case_title: AVERY MONTAQUE VS. LE SALON ENTERTAINMENT INC et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTAQUE, AVERY AS TO DEFENDANT LE SALON ENTERTAINMENT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION BOUJAKLIAN, JACK AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTAQUE, AVERY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LE SALON ENTERTAINMENT INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION BOUJAKLIAN, JACK AN INDIVIDUAL $5,293.41 PRINCIPAL, $49.52 INTEREST, $112.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,455.23, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
